overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates neon-lit sidewalks, crosses busy streets, and traverses a crowded intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon advertisements and traffic barrier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, observing passing traffic and neon signs

entered.detail: large green neon corporate signage mounted on high-rise building
giant digital billboard displaying a red and silver soda can advertisement
green painted metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked sidewalk in a cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves forward past a green metal railing with cars streaming by on the right. A massive digital billboard displaying a soda advertisement dominates the left side, while the iconic green 'Orbital Air' neon sign glows in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with outdoor dining patio

events.description: turns left and steps off the curb to cross the multi-lane street
finishes crossing and steps onto the opposite sidewalk near outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk, passing by an outdoor cafe area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: wooden patio fence with tables, chairs, and umbrellas outside a restaurant
low-rise beige concrete building with multiple windows and ground-floor shops
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with teal structural supports

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to cross the wet asphalt street, navigating between passing vehicles. Upon reaching the opposite side, the scene shifts to a sidewalk lined with an outdoor cafe featuring wooden fencing and umbrellas. A beige office building rises on the left while an overhead pedestrian bridge becomes visible further down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and digital advertising

events.description: waits at the crosswalk as futuristic cars pass through the intersection
begins crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians as traffic clears

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the intersection with a crowd of pedestrians, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting at the corner then crossing together

entered.detail: white painted pedestrian crossing lines with yellow and red textured sections
black metal pole with traffic lights and pedestrian signals
large vertical digital screen cycling through advertisements including a green 'All Foods Burrito' display

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection and waits at the crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by. Joining a moderate crowd of pedestrians, they cross the wide intersection marked with colorful zebra stripes. A large digital billboard displaying rotating advertisements, including one for 'All Foods,' dominates the left side while the overhead pedestrian bridge looms closer overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a neon-lit sidewalk toward a bustling, high-tech intersection. It begins by gliding past a green metal railing and a massive soda advertisement, with the glow of an Orbital Air sign guiding the way through the nighttime drizzle. As the camera turns left to cross the wet asphalt between streaming vehicles, the environment shifts toward a sidewalk lined with the wooden fencing and umbrellas of an outdoor cafe beneath a beige office building. The scene then expands as the camera approaches a wide intersection, where it joins a crowd of pedestrians crossing colorful zebra stripes. Finally, the perspective moves under a looming pedestrian bridge while a rotating digital billboard for All Foods dominates the skyline.
